code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut sorted = true

  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut cur = 0

  while i <= n
    mut b = -1
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        -1
      end
    end

    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or i == n
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_minus = b == 45
    let is_plus = b == 43

    if is_space
      if in_num
        let value = sign * cur
        if has_prev
          if value < prev
            sorted = false
          end
        end
        prev = value
        has_prev = true
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        cur = 0
      end
    else if is_digit
      in_num = true
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if is_minus
      in_num = true
      sign = -1
    else if is_plus
      in_num = true
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
